commit.message:
feat: unified platform-aware extra-libraries syntax

Replace separate `extra-linux-libraries` and `extra-darwin-libraries`
fields with a unified `extra-libraries` that supports both simple
strings and objects with platform filters.

New syntax supports:
- Simple string: "libGL" (applies to all platforms)
- Object with platforms: { pkg = "libdrm", platforms = ["*-linux"] }

Platform patterns:
- "*-linux" matches all Linux systems
- "*-darwin" matches all macOS systems
- Exact system names like "x86_64-linux"

Also updates README nixpkgs examples to use commit hashes instead
of branch names for reproducibility.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
